headline: AvalonBay And Equity Residential Merger Reshapes Multifamily REIT Valuation Story
summary: AvalonBay Communities (NYSE:AVB) and Equity Residential have agreed to merge, creating a combined multifamily REIT under a newly announced executive leadership team. The companies have outlined how the merged REIT will be structured, including key management roles and governance for the integrated platform. The transaction, once completed, is expected to bring together large portfolios of apartment communities across major U.S. markets. AvalonBay Communities focuses on owning, developing,...
